message:
fix(cli): read version from package.json instead of hardcoding

The v0.1.1 smoke test caught `textsift --help` printing
`textsift 0.1.0` (stale hardcoded string in src/cli.ts) while the
package was actually 0.1.1. Read the live version from the umbrella
package.json at runtime so the banner can't drift from what's
installed.

Falls back to 'unknown' on read failure (e.g. someone bundles the CLI
through a tool that strips package.json — vanishingly rare, but
keeps the read non-fatal).
